title: Rhodanthe maryonii
intro: Rhodanthe maryonii, also known as Maryon's Everlasting, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Rhodanthe maryonii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Rhodanthe maryonii is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and digestive issues.
